screen.aetherion.astral_codex.title: Astral Codex
codex.aetherion.starshard.title: Starshard
codex.aetherion.starshard.body: Crystalline fragments of fallen stars. Mine their ore deep underground and refine them into Aetherium.
codex.aetherion.aetherium.title: Aetherium
codex.aetherion.aetherium.body: A resilient astral metal smelted from Starshards. It forms tools, armor, portal frames, and ritual devices.
codex.aetherion.astral_altar.title: Astral Altar
codex.aetherion.astral_altar.body: Place a catalyst on the altar and one ingredient on each pedestal exactly two blocks north, south, east, and west.
codex.aetherion.rift_key.title: Rift Key
codex.aetherion.rift_key.body: Crafted through an Astral Altar ritual. Use it on a complete Aetherium frame to awaken a gateway.
codex.aetherion.rift_gateway.title: Rift Gateway
codex.aetherion.rift_gateway.body: Build a 4 by 5 outer frame of Aetherium around a 2 by 3 empty interior, then touch the frame with a Rift Key.
codex.aetherion.the_expanse.title: The Expanse
codex.aetherion.the_expanse.body: A starlit dimension beyond the Rift Gateway. Astral Charge regenerates more quickly beneath its alien sky.
codex.aetherion.astral_charge.title: Astral Charge
codex.aetherion.astral_charge.body: Astral abilities consume this energy. Hold a lens, staff, or Phase Pearl to display the current charge.
codex.aetherion.starcaller_staff.title: Starcaller Staff
codex.aetherion.starcaller_staff.body: Use the staff to fire a Star Bolt. Sneak while using it to call a targeted starfall at greater charge cost.
codex.aetherion.phase_pearl.title: Phase Pearl
codex.aetherion.phase_pearl.body: Use Astral Charge to blink safely toward the point under your crosshair.
codex.aetherion.starfall.title: Starfall
codex.aetherion.starfall.body: Fallen stars cross the Overworld night sky and leave a crater with a Fallen Star Core at its heart.
codex.aetherion.sundered_sigil.title: Sundered Sigil
codex.aetherion.sundered_sigil.body: Use this sigil on a Fallen Star Core to begin the summoning of the Sundered Sentinel.
codex.aetherion.aster.title: Aster
codex.aetherion.aster.body: Aster, the Sundered Sentinel, changes tactics as its health falls. Prepare for slams, Star Bolts, and summoned wisps.
codex.aetherion.star_wisp.title: Star Wisp
codex.aetherion.star_wisp.body: A volatile astral minion called by Aster during the final phase of battle.
codex.aetherion.aetherium_armor.title: Aetherium Armor
codex.aetherion.aetherium_armor.body: Wear the complete Aetherium set to gain its combined astral protection and set bonus.
advancement.aetherion.root.title: Aetherion
advancement.aetherion.root.description: Follow the path of fallen stars.
advancement.aetherion.starshard.title: A Glint Below
advancement.aetherion.aetherium.title: Metal of the Stars
advancement.aetherion.altar.title: Four Points, One Sky
advancement.aetherion.rift_key.title: The Key Beyond
advancement.aetherion.rift_key.descripti: Complete the altar ritual for a Rift Key.
advancement.aetherion.expanse.title: Across the Rift
advancement.aetherion.sigil.title: A Sentinel Stirs
advancement.aetherion.aster.title: Sundered No More
advancement.aetherion.staff.title: Call Down the Stars
advancement.aetherion.pearl.title: A Step Between
advancement.aetherion.armor_set.title: Astral Bulwark
advancement.aetherion.armor_set.descript: Collect the complete Aetherium armor set.
advancement.aetherion.lens.title: Through an Astral Lens
